resourceTemplates.name: list-anthropic-sessions-filtered
resourceTemplates.title: List Anthropic sessions with filters
resourceTemplates.description: List Anthropic sessions owned by the current user with optional Anthropic query filters. The secure scraper filters the API response by metadata Owners.

resourceTemplates.name: get-anthropic-session
resourceTemplates.title: Get Anthropic session
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieve an Anthropic session by ID. The secure scraper only returns sessions where the current user is listed in metadata Owners.

resourceTemplates.name: list-anthropic-session-resources
resourceTemplates.title: List Anthropic session resources
resourceTemplates.description: List resources attached to an Anthropic session. The secure scraper requires the current user to be an owner of the parent session.

resourceTemplates.name: get-anthropic-session-resource
resourceTemplates.title: Get Anthropic session resource
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieve a resource attached to an Anthropic session. The secure scraper requires the current user to be an owner of the parent session.

resourceTemplates.name: list-anthropic-session-events
resourceTemplates.title: List Anthropic session events
resourceTemplates.description: List events for an Anthropic session. The secure scraper requires the current user to be an owner of the parent session.
